special_mechanics.name: Real-time Exploration
special_mechanics.description: Player controls party of up to three characters as they explore 3D environments including futuristic cities, space vessels, and outdoor areas

special_mechanics.name: Turn-based Combat
special_mechanics.description: Similar to Final Fantasy's Active Time Battle system where each character has a meter that gradually fills with time before they can act

special_mechanics.name: Character Positioning
special_mechanics.description: Characters can move to different positions during combat encounters

tier_notes: Tier 3: Anachronox is an RPG with real-time exploration and turn-based combat. Wikipedia source provides high-level gameplay mechanics but no physics parameters (movement speeds, gravity, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel systems). As an RPG built on heavily modified Quake II engine, specific movement physics are not publicly documented in standard sources.
